response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though her lack of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience and limited German proficiency may require onboarding support.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience with AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and testing culture (CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-equivalent tools)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited German language proficiency may hinder collaboration
Extensive but fragmented project history raises questions about depth in enterprise automation
